properties.value: If ON, Abseil will build all of Abseil's own tests.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: If ON, Abseil will build libraries that you can use to write tests against Abseil code. This option requires that Abseil is configured to use GoogleTest.

properties.name: HELPSTRING

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: If ON, Abseil will assume that the targets for GoogleTest are already provided by the including project. This makes sense when Abseil is used with add_subdirectory.

properties.name: HELPSTRING
properties.value: If ON, abseil will download HEAD from GoogleTest at config time.
